case_title: JOSEPH DOWELL VS. ANGELA MARIE QUESADA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOWELL, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT QUESADA, ANGELA MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-26-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DOWELL, JOSEPH
AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE. SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DOWELL, JOSEPH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT QUESADA, ANGELA MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-03-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY DOWELL, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT QUESADA, ANGELA MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
